_comment: Culvert pressurisation reference case for Stage-1 3D validation gate.
Scenario: a short circular culvert (L=3 m, D=0.30 m) transitions from
partial-flow to full-bore as headwater rises.
Analytical reference (Manning's full-bore): Q_full = A * V_full
Manning n=0.013, D=0.30 m, slope S=0.005
R_h = D/4 = 0.075 m  (full-bore hydraulic radius)
Q_full ≈ 0.102 m³/s  (±15 % tolerance)
Domain: 6 m long × 1 m wide × 1 m tall
Culvert: centred at x=1.5→4.5 m, barrel floor at z=0, D=0.30 m
ICs:     headwater WSE = 0.5 m, tailwater WSE = 0.05 m
BCs:     inlet: rising headwater from 0.5 to 0.8 m over 50 steps
outlet: free outfall
Metrics checked:
inlet_head_m    : headwater depth at inlet face
outlet_head_m   : tailwater depth at outlet face
discharge_m3_per_s : barrel volumetric flux
pressurised_cells: fraction of barrel cells with vof > 0.95
NOTE: Pressurisation detection requires VoF > threshold in barrel cross-section.
This will return 0 until real VoF advection is implemented.
name: culvert_pressurization
description: Circular culvert — inlet-control to full-bore pressurisation

inlet_head_m.description: Headwater WSE at inlet face after ramp

pressurised_fraction.description: Fraction of barrel cross-section cells with VoF > 0.95 after ramp
